title: Heavy rainfall, thundersquall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
full_text:
Heavy rainfall, thundersquall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
IMD issued heavy rainfall, thundersquall & heatwave warning for several states/UTs for Sunday. Rainfall is likely over Andaman & Nicobar Islands, WB, Sikkim, Arunachal, Assam, Meghalaya, Kerala, Karnataka, TN and Puducherry. Thundersquall is likely over Andaman and Nicobar Islands and Jharkhand. Heatwave is likely over Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi, Jharkhand, MP, Punjab, Rajasthan, UP & Maharashtra.
